/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/property_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/richio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/dsnlexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/ptree.cpp.o -o property_tree  -pthread -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0
